citizen_posts.content: Did the sky just... ripple? Near the Foundation thermal vents. It looked like a giant eye opening in the clouds.
Gravity Core B-4 is making that 'heartbeat' sound again. Engineering says it's fine, but my coffee is pulsing in the cup.
Anyone else see the shadow? It must have been 500 meters long. It passed right under the Mid-Ring transit line.
The Council just issued a 'Level 2 Atmospheric Disturbance' warning. They never do that. Stay indoors, people.
I heard a song. Not a bird, not a machine. A deep, low-frequency hum coming from the Abyss. It felt like it was inside my head.
My sensors just picked up a biological mass larger than a satellite island. It's moving upwards. FAST.
Shadow Ministry agents spotted at the East Docks. They're confiscating all long-range telescopes. What are they hiding?
The 'Wind Whales' aren't friendly. I saw one breach the cloud layer. It didn't have skin, it had... scales of pure light.
Emergency lockdown in Sector 7! The ground just tilted by 3 degrees. I think the anchors are slipping.
If you see the Abyss Whale, do not blink. It's not looking at the city. It's looking at YOU.
